mapper.sql: id, name, code, type, department_id, department_name, price, specimen_type, container, instructions, preparation, turnaround_time, status, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM medical_technology WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY type, name
SELECT FROM medical_technology WHERE type = #{type} AND status = 1 ORDER BY name
SELECT FROM medical_technology WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY name
mapper.delete: UPDATE medical_technology SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
